violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Observed numerous wiping cloths on food prep surface rather than in sanitizing solution.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Observed numerous items in walk in cooler that were not date marked.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Observed cardboard on floor beneath griddle. Cardboard is not a cleanable material.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Observed seal on walk in freezer was damaged.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Observed doors and sides of appliances need to be cleaned.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. -Observed plates and bowls above griddle were not inverted during storage.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Observed acoustic ceiling tile in food prep area that is neither smooth, nor cleanable.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Observed cracked floor tiles in food prep area.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Observed floor under griddle and hot hold and cold hold units need to be cleaned.
